intro: Over the 16 days from April 13 to 29, 2026, ZCyberNews published 10 articles tagged with rapid7, covering two critical and two high-severity incidents alongside four informational reports. The threat actor Kyber was observed targeting enterprise IT, financial services, government, managed services, and technology sectors across Europe, Global, and North America regions. Key vulnerabilities included CVE-2025-59718 and CVE-2026-41940, both carrying a CVSS score of 9.8.
